introSection: Strom is a steel roller coaster located at Magic Park Land in Ensuès-la-Redonne, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The ride operated at EuroPark Milano Idroscalo in Italy from 2006 to 2014 or earlier. It was called Storm until 2011, when the name was changed to Roller Coaster.

It reopened at Magic Park Land in France on April 25, 2015.

fullText:
Strom is a steel roller coaster located at Magic Park Land in Ensuès-la-Redonne, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France.

The ride operated at EuroPark Milano Idroscalo in Italy from 2006 to 2014 or earlier. It was called Storm until 2011, when the name was changed to Roller Coaster.

It reopened at Magic Park Land in France on April 25, 2015.
